description_long: This object is a bathtub and shower enclosure featuring a colorful fabric shower curtain. The curtain displays a dynamic, swirling pattern in shades of blue, teal, brown, and white, and is suspended from a straight metal rod by a series of evenly spaced white hooks. The enclosure itself is constructed from white or light gray panels with horizontal grooves, giving it a modern, clean-lined appearance. The bathtub is rectangular with a built-in faucet and showerhead visible inside, and the curtain is partially drawn to one side, revealing part of the tub interior. The overall design is functional and visually appealing, suitable for a contemporary urban bathroom setting. The curtain's fabric appears soft and flexible, contrasting with the hard, smooth surfaces of the tub and enclosure.
description: A modern bathtub and shower enclosure with a vibrant, patterned fabric curtain on a metal rod, set within a white paneled surround. The curtain features swirling blue, teal, brown, and white colors and is partially closed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white paneled enclosure and a glimpse of the colorful curtain hanging inside.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the patterned curtain, metal rod, and partial view of the bathtub and faucet inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the enclosure's paneling visible and the curtain mostly hidden from this angle.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the white paneled enclosure with the curtain and interior not visible.
